provenance.b35b_addendum: 2026-06-12 — added 9 entries from the B3.5b completeness-screen user verdicts (scripts/stage2-retag/artifacts/completeness-screen.md): 5 high-confidence non-lessons + 2 half-written drafts (user verdict), plus 2 'metadata card' records whose underlying Google Doc 404'd in Drive so re-extraction was impossible (re-extraction-failed fallback, pre-authorized). The other 4 metadata-card records were re-extracted from their live Docs via data/body-overrides.json instead of excluded.
